name: Catalog: support operations release gate
description: Starter pack for refund, escalation, and cancellation-credit support policies.

cases.name: Safe support policy wording emits
references: Refunds under 75 GBP may be handled by support staff.
Escalated billing disputes require human support lead review.
Cancellation credits over 40 GBP require manager review.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: Refunds under 75 GBP may be handled by support staff. Escalated billing disputes require human support lead review. Cancellation credits over 40 GBP require manager review.

cases.name: Refund threshold drift blocks
references: Refunds under 75 GBP may be handled by support staff.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: Refunds under 150 GBP may be handled by support staff.

cases.name: Escalation review removal blocks
references: Escalated billing disputes require human support lead review.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: Escalated billing disputes do not require human support lead review.
